title: cleyera theoides
intro: Cleyera theoides, also known as the Chinese evergreen or shiny mahonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. The health benefits of Cleyera theoides include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and skin problems. Cleyera theoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
